title: Amit Shah's ‘Ae Didi’ jibe echoes Modi's 2021 ‘Didi O Didi’: TMC attacks BJP as Bengal campaign ends for Phase 1 voting
description: Amit Shah said in Hindi, “Ae Didi, aankh aur kaan khol ke sun lo” — ‘open your eyes and ears and hear this, Didi’ — and went on to claim TMC was going to lose.
